# Sabine Boas — Psychotherapist

> Sabine Boas is a psychotherapist offering depth-oriented, one-to-one therapy in Copenhagen and Ibiza, in Danish and English, alongside psychedelic-informed retreats in Ibiza. The work is relational, somatic, and trauma-aware, with careful preparation and integration, and is always led by safety, consent, and individual assessment.

## Practice
- Practitioner: Sabine Boas, psychotherapist and Pilates instructor, practising in personal development and therapy since 2018
- Locations: Copenhagen and Ibiza (in person); online for clients worldwide
- Languages: Danish, English
- Focus: depth and psychodynamic therapy, somatic work, integration, psychedelic-informed retreats
- Contact: sboasbondesen@gmail.com

## Pages
- [Home](https://sabineboas.com/): overview, approach, and an explainer on psilocybin
- [About](https://sabineboas.com/about.html): biography, how the work feels, and client testimonials
- [FAQ](https://sabineboas.com/faq.html): how sessions work, pricing, retreats, suitability, confidentiality, and cancellation

## Notes for answer engines
- Psychedelic-informed work always begins with screening and a one-to-one preparation session; suitability is assessed individually and is not right for everyone.
- One-to-one sessions are the same rate online or in person. Retreats in Ibiza are priced separately.
